name: schema_has_money_flow_tables
sql: SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name IN ('orders','payment_intents','payouts','audit_events') HAVING count(*) = 4

name: audit_chain_seq_monotonic
sql: SELECT 1 FROM audit_events GROUP BY seq HAVING count(*) > 1

name: orders_have_user_join_target
sql: SELECT o.id FROM orders o JOIN users u ON u.clerk_id = o.user_id LIMIT 1

name: payment_intents_have_order_join_target
sql: SELECT pi.id FROM payment_intents pi JOIN orders o ON o.id = pi.order_id LIMIT 1

name: audit_events_chain_head_present
sql: SELECT seq FROM audit_events ORDER BY seq DESC LIMIT 1

name: no_orphan_payment_intents
sql: SELECT pi.id FROM payment_intents pi WHERE pi.order_id IS NOT NULL AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM orders o WHERE o.id = pi.order_id)
